what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-source channel, pointing to slide p-11 of a 15-page presentation via an image:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
standouts: The file is purely a typed pointer to an external image asset
The target URI embeds a presentation path and slide identifier
No caption, alt text, or descriptive content is present
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Attachment records are file-local and channel-scoped
References assets with a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: File contains no description of the image content
No evidence that the referenced image URI is resolvable from this file alone
No versioning or provenance beyond an added timestamp
notes: A minimal ledger entry that registers a presentation slide image as an attachment for the design-source channel.
questions: What content is shown on slide p-11 of presentation-15p?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by the consuming system?
Are caption, alt text, or tags expected to be added later?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment ledger entry matches the actual content: it records a typed pointer to an image asset.
intention_signals: To catalog a specific slide image from a presentation so the design-source channel can reference or retrieve it.
contribution: A timestamped, typed attachment record that links the design-source channel to a specific presentation slide image.
summary_for_embedding: Attachment metadata file att-a080df0f in the design-source channel pointing to image p-11 of presentation-15p.
intention_for_embedding: To register a presentation slide image as an attachment for the design-source channel.
